narrative:
Carryall Township has 1,944 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.0 percentage points.
